ddls:
CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name or description of the sample */,
  "total_abundance" INTEGER /* Total abundance of species observed in the sample */,
  "taxon_number" INTEGER /* Total number of unique taxa in the sample */,
  "location" TEXT /* Geographical location where the sample was collected */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was collected */,
  "method_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sampling method used for the sample */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., forest, marine, grassland) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_method_id FOREIGN KEY ("method_id") REFERENCES sampling_methods ("method_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "diversity_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the diversity metrics entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this metric is related to */,
  "brillouin_diversity" REAL /* Brillouin's diversity index for the sample */,
  "brillouin_max_diversity" REAL /* Maximum Brillouin's diversity possible for the sample */,
  "brillouin_min_diversity" REAL /* Minimum Brillouin's diversity possible for the sample */,
  "brillouin_evenness" REAL /* Brillouin's evenness measure */,
  "brillouin_rel_evenness" REAL /* Relative evenness according to Brillouin's index */,
  "heips_evenness" REAL /* Heip's evenness measure */,
  "hills_evenness" REAL /* Hill's evenness measure */,
  "shannons_evenness" REAL /* Evenness measure based on Shannon's diversity index */,
  "simpsons_evenness" REAL /* Evenness measure based on Simpson's dominance index */,
  "pielous_evenness" REAL /* Evenness measure based on Pielou's evenness index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_diversity_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "hill_metrics" (
  "hill_metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for Hill's metrics entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this metric is related to */,
  "hill_N1" REAL /* Hill's diversity index (N1) */,
  "hill_N2" REAL /* Hill's diversity index (N2) */,
  "hill_N0" REAL /* Hill's diversity index (N0) */,
  "hill_N3" REAL /* Hill's diversity index (N3) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("hill_metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_hill_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "richness_indices" (
  "richness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the richness indices entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this index is related to */,
  "margalefs_richness" REAL /* Margalef's richness index for the sample */,
  "menhinicks_index" REAL /* Menhinick's index for the sample */,
  "chao1_richness" REAL /* Chao1 richness estimator */,
  "jackknife_richness" REAL /* Jackknife richness estimator */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("richness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_richness_indices_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shannon_metrics" (
  "shannon_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for Shannon's metrics entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this metric is related to */,
  "shannons_diversity" REAL /* Shannon's diversity index for the sample */,
  "shannons_evenness" REAL /* Evenness measure based on Shannon's diversity index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shannon_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shannon_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "simpson_metrics" (
  "simpson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for Simpson's metrics entry */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sample this metric is related to */,
  "simpsons_dominance" REAL /* Simpson's dominance index for the sample */,
  "simpsons_evenness" REAL /* Evenness measure based on Simpson's dominance index */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("simpson_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_simpson_metrics_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or organization the user belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sample being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the sample */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the sample was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access session (in seconds) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_sample_id FOREIGN KEY ("sample_id") REFERENCES samples ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sampling_methods" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sampling method */,
  "method_name" TEXT /* Name of the sampling method */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the method */,
  "sampling_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of sampling (e.g., monthly, annually) */,
  "sampling_tool" TEXT /* Tool or equipment used for sampling */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id")
)
